description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define three stages: check, test, and deploy. In the check stage add a lint job that runs npm install then npm run lint. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm install then npm test. In the deploy stage add a pack job that runs npm install then npm pack and stores any .tgz files as artifacts. The pipeline runs on all branches without additional rules.
